steps.title: Combine evidence and policy
steps.content: Text 1 says northern pike face much worse warming outcomes and will likely need conservation, while white-tailed deer can withstand the predicted warming without much harm. Text 2 says agencies should focus on the species most threatened and most in need.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported additions
steps.content: Choice A is about preventing temperature increases, which neither text discusses. Choice C adds a claim about collaboration improving success. Choice D says both species need immediate programs, contradicting Text 1's point about deer. The shared conclusion is to prioritize pike over deer. The answer is B.
